TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Don Bielke sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay nqu tay , Don Bielke, squliq na p'unro. Bielke mzyu mari maki Valparaiso Crusaders krau' pqwasan biru. 1954 kawas NBA pspung te spat ,tmwang Wayne Pistons. 1955-1956 kawas, maki Wayne Pistons pitu' pspung. masoq mzyu mari NBA lga,Bielke cbaqan mzyu mari mpuw tzyu' kawas maki California Concordia krahu' pqwasan biru.ru cbaqan mzyu mari mpuw kawas,maki California Lutheran pqwasan biru. raral ga,Bielke cbaqan seto' ru sinisy mpuw kawas nya maki California Lutheran krahu' pqwasan biru. mzyu mari na sinsiy maki krahu' pqwasan biru,1977-1978 kawas pspung ryax ru 1979-1980 kawas pspung ryax,hiya magal blaq 成績. hiya mtzyaw 27 kawas maki krahu' pqwasan biru na mslokah 系 ru sinsiy na kinesiology . 1990 kawas, Bielke magal NAIA te cyugal sqabu. magal kwara Amerika ru maki mzyu mari, maki YMCA na squilq. Don Bielke magal Valparaiso ru San Francisco krau' pqwasan biru cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on βielke s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj nqu taj , *on βielke, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. βielke mzju mari maki *alparais~ɕo ʦ~ʨrus~ɕa*ers~ɕ krauʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ nβa ps~ɕpuŋ te s~ɕpat ,tmwaŋ wajne pis~ɕtons~ɕ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ, maki wajne pis~ɕtons~ɕ pituʔ ps~ɕpuŋ. mas~ɕoq mzju mari nβa lɣa,βielke ʦ~ʨβaqan mzju mari mpuw tzjuʔ kawas~ɕ maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia ʦ~ʨonʦ~ʨor*ia kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.ru ʦ~ʨβaqan mzju mari mpuw kawas~ɕ,maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia lutħeran pqwas~ɕan βiru. raral ɣa,βielke ʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕetoʔ ru s~ɕinis~ɕj mpuw kawas~ɕ nja maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia lutħeran kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. mzju mari na s~ɕins~ɕij maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru,****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax ru ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax,ħija maɣal βlaq **. ħija mtzjaw ** kawas~ɕ maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru na ms~ɕlokaħ * ru s~ɕins~ɕij na kines~ɕioloɣj . **** kawas~ɕ, βielke maɣal naia te ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕqaβu. maɣal kwara amerika ru maki mzju mari, maki jmʦ~ʨa na s~ɕquilq. *on βielke maɣal *alparais~ɕo ru s~ɕan *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo krauʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Don Bielke sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay nqu tay , Don Bielke, squliq na p'unro. Bielke mzyu mari maki Valparaiso Crusaders krau' pqwasan biru. 1954 kawas NBA pspung te spat ,tmwang Wayne Pistons. 1955-1956 kawas, maki Wayne Pistons pitu' pspung. masoq mzyu mari NBA lga,Bielke cbaqan mzyu mari mpuw tzyu' kawas maki California Concordia krahu' pqwasan biru.ru cbaqan mzyu mari mpuw kawas,maki California Lutheran pqwasan biru. raral ga,Bielke cbaqan seto' ru sinisy mpuw kawas nya maki California Lutheran krahu' pqwasan biru. mzyu mari na sinsiy maki krahu' pqwasan biru,1977-1978 kawas pspung ryax ru 1979-1980 kawas pspung ryax,hiya magal blaq 成績. hiya mtzyaw 27 kawas maki krahu' pqwasan biru na mslokah 系 ru sinsiy na kinesiology . 1990 kawas, Bielke magal NAIA te cyugal sqabu. magal kwara Amerika ru maki mzyu mari, maki YMCA na squilq. Don Bielke magal Valparaiso ru San Francisco krau' pqwasan biru cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on βielke s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj nqu taj , *on βielke, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. βielke mzju mari maki *alparais~ɕo ʦ~ʨrus~ɕa*ers~ɕ krauʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ nβa ps~ɕpuŋ te s~ɕpat ,tmwaŋ wajne pis~ɕtons~ɕ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ, maki wajne pis~ɕtons~ɕ pituʔ ps~ɕpuŋ. mas~ɕoq mzju mari nβa lɣa,βielke ʦ~ʨβaqan mzju mari mpuw tzjuʔ kawas~ɕ maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia ʦ~ʨonʦ~ʨor*ia kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.ru ʦ~ʨβaqan mzju mari mpuw kawas~ɕ,maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia lutħeran pqwas~ɕan βiru. raral ɣa,βielke ʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕetoʔ ru s~ɕinis~ɕj mpuw kawas~ɕ nja maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia lutħeran kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. mzju mari na s~ɕins~ɕij maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru,****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax ru ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax,ħija maɣal βlaq **. ħija mtzjaw ** kawas~ɕ maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru na ms~ɕlokaħ * ru s~ɕins~ɕij na kines~ɕioloɣj . **** kawas~ɕ, βielke maɣal naia te ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕqaβu. maɣal kwara amerika ru maki mzju mari, maki jmʦ~ʨa na s~ɕquilq. *on βielke maɣal *alparais~ɕo ru s~ɕan *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo krauʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
